/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libzoo_loop_functions.dylib -install_name @rpath/libzoo_loop_functions.dylib CMakeFiles/zoo_loop_functions.dir/zoo_loop_functions_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zoo_loop_functions.dir/zoo_loop_functions.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/tom.backert/Repos/marl-platform/argos_plugins/build/controllers -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/argos3 ../controllers/libmy_ipc_controller.dylib /usr/local/lib/argos3/libargos3core_simulator.dylib /usr/local/lib/argos3/libargos3plugin_simulator_genericrobot.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libzmq.dylib /usr/local/lib/argos3/libargos3plugin_simulator_footbot.dylib
